meta_description: Find the latest updates and press releases from JLCCNC.

sections.heading: Newsroom
sections.text: Newsroom Notice on the Upcoming EU Tax Reform Effective July 2026 An official advisory has been issued for customers across the European Union regarding the upcoming EU Tax Reform. Effective July 1, 2026, this major regulatory shift implemented by the European Union will impact import and customs procedures for low-value shipments entering EU member states. To ensure uninterrupted service and minimize clearance delays, all EU-based clients are urged to familiarize themselves with these new regulations.
